title: Default workspace permissions
excerpt: Is there a way to reset “permissions” back to default? Or, can someone point me to a list of what is/is not checked for Owners, Members, Non-members?

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to reset “permissions” back to default? Or, can someone point me to a list of what is/is not checked for Owners, Members, Non-members?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Just create a brand new workspace and you’ll see the defaults there
